violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Several floor tiles near 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2025
